mainEntity.name: How far is Grebaštica from Tisno, and how long is the drive?

acceptedAnswer.text: The drive from Tisno to Grebaštica is around 45 km and takes roughly 55 min in normal traffic, a little longer at busy times in summer. I plan the pickup so a slow patch never leaves you rushed.

mainEntity.name: How much is a taxi from Tisno to Grebaštica?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed 70 per car for up to 4 passengers, one way, luggage included. A return trip is 140.
At your exact address in Tisno, whether a home, hotel or apartment. Send the address when you book and I will confirm the meeting point.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: At least 2 hours ahead so I can confirm the car and your pickup time. For a sooner ride, call or WhatsApp me directly.
